dj_text: That Pirate DJ Radio Bot Radio. Broadcasting bad decisions since day one. That was AK47. Now let's pretend we're in a coffee shop with We're All In the Same Gang. Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: Tired of making decisions? Let That Pirate DJ Radio Bot Choose decide for you.
recovery_text: And STAY off our frequency! Go back to your own dimension!
title: We're All In the Same Gang
